defs: (of sb or sth) to be (located) at
(used before a verb to indicate an action in progress)
to rest with; to lie in; to be due to (a certain attribute)
(often used in the negative) to care about
to be on the throne; to reign
to hold a particular leadership position

pinyin: zai4 qian1 jun1 yi1 fa4 zhi1 ji4
defs: at the critical moment; in the nick of time
(Tw) local; native (from Taiwanese 在地, Tai-lo pr. [tsāi-tē])
to be present; to be on the scene
soul and spirit of the deceased

trad: 在天願做比翼鳥，在地願做連理枝
simp: 在天愿做比翼鸟，在地愿做连理枝
pinyin: zai4 tian1 yuan4 zuo4 bi3 yi4 niao3 , zai4 di4 yuan4 zuo4 lian2 li3 zhi1
defs: In the sky to be two birds flying wing to wing, on earth to be two trees with branches intertwined
(at a workplace) to be in (as opposed to being away on official business 出差[chu1 chai1])
(Buddhism etc) to remain a layman (as opposed to becoming a monk or a nun 出家[chu1 jia1])

trad: 在家千日好，出門一時難
simp: 在家千日好，出门一时难
pinyin: zai4 jia1 qian1 ri4 hao3 , chu1 men2 yi1 shi2 nan2
defs: lit. at home, one can spend a thousand days in comfort, but spending a day away from home can be challenging (idiom)
fig. there's no place like home

trad: 在家靠父母，出外靠朋友
simp: 在家靠父母，出外靠朋友
pinyin: zai4 jia1 kao4 fu4 mu3 , chu1 wai4 kao4 peng2 you5
defs: one depends on one's parents when at home, and on one's friends when away from home (idiom)

trad: 在家靠父母，出門靠朋友
simp: 在家靠父母，出门靠朋友
pinyin: zai4 jia1 kao4 fu4 mu3 , chu1 men2 kao4 peng2 you5
defs: one depends on one's parents when at home, and on one's friends when away from home (idiom)
to have no concerns whatsoever about
to be a believer (in a religion, esp. Islam)
to rest with; to lie in; to be due to (a certain attribute)
(of a matter) to be determined by; to be up to (sb)
(fig.) in the offing; around the corner; soon to materialize
(attributive) to be enrolled in a school (or university etc)
(fig.) (coll.) (of a person) mentally focused; engaged; (of skills, performance etc) sharp; on point; functioning at a high level
(of personnel or positions) having permanent status under China's official staffing system 編制|编制[bian1 zhi4], with full benefits and job security
to be an expert in a trade or profession
to be studying (at a school or research institute)
to be occupied or burdened with (work, a contract, a lawsuit)
to be at large (of a criminal)
(adverbial expression indicating that the attention of the subject of the verb is focused on what they are doing, not distracted by anything else)
